points.text: Wear a face mask in public spaces and when sharing a room or vehicle with others [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]
Wash hands regularly with soap and water and avoid touching unwashed hands to your face [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
Maintain physical or social distancing from people who may be infected [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
Stay home except for essential medical care and call ahead before visiting a healthcare provider [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]
Cover coughs and sneezes with a tissue or your elbow [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]
Avoid sharing personal household items such as utensils, towels, or phones [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]
Improve indoor ventilation by opening windows or using air filtration [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
Practice good personal hygiene and maintain a healthy diet [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00133]
Stay up to date with COVID‑19 vaccination to reduce infection risk [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00019]
Quarantine if exposed or symptomatic for at least 10 days to prevent spread [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00129]
Keep indoor spaces well‑ventilated to improve airflow. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Maintain physical distance from others, especially in crowded areas. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Wear a mask in settings where COVID‑19 transmission risk is high. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Practice good hand hygiene: wash hands with soap for at least 20 seconds. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]
Use an alcohol‑based hand sanitizer (≥60% alcohol) when soap isn’t available. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]
Cover coughs and sneezes with a tissue or your elbow, then wash hands. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]
Avoid close contact with anyone who is sick or showing symptoms. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]
Stay home if you feel ill or test positive for COVID‑19. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00022]
Get up to date with COVID‑19 vaccination to lower infection risk. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Limit time spent in poorly ventilated indoor spaces with many people. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Wear a mask in public places where community transmission is occurring or physical distancing is not possible. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Keep at least 1 metre (about 3 feet) distance from other people in public. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Avoid crowded, confined, or poorly ventilated indoor spaces. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Wash hands frequently with soap and water or use an alcohol‑based hand rub. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Keep indoor spaces well ventilated by opening windows or using fans. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Get vaccinated against COVID‑19 to reduce infection risk and severity. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]
Continue physical distancing, mask wearing, and hand hygiene even after vaccination. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]
Seek care early if you develop symptoms and stay home to avoid exposing others. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00021]
Follow travel precautions: check latest COVID‑19 updates and avoid unnecessary travel to high‑risk areas. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]
Limit exposure by staying away from public places like workplaces, schools, or public transport when symptomatic. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00021]
